decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 6/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 12 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 80/3151 lines reworked (2.5%, 23/50). 0/32 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 3.2% (8/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 58. Session 8: 57 (process:30 efficiency:17 ttfw:10). Session 11: 50 (process:30 efficiency:12 ttfw:8). Session 12: 51 (process:30 efficiency:16 ttfw:5).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 217/217 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
